description: Coulson, Mack, and Fitz enter the Miami blackout zone to locate Yo-Yo and investigate the EMP. As their tech fails due to a continuous series of pulses, Fitz realizes they must rely on low-tech, old-school methods. The team prepares to brave the city without their usual equipment, intent on finding both Elena and the source of the attack.
location: Zephyr One (S.H.I.E.L.D. quinjet / mobile command plane)

transcript.line: We're 2 minutes from the blackout zone and 10 minutes from the hotel Agent Rodriguez called you from. We'll grab her first, then Fitz can do his thing.
It doesn't make sense. The EMPs only short-circuit electronics that have been turned on at the time.
Well, I haven't heard from her since. I mean, she... she can't find a phone that was turned off?
Does the backseat science department care to weigh in on this?
She's at a bachelorette party. She's probably having a good time, dancing and drinking with all those sexy Latino guys.
No, I'm not taking that bait.
